summary: The Sample Contacts (P_ 208) can also serve

mechanics.name_guess: The Sample Contacts (P_ 208) can also serve
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 083 > npcs > The Sample Contacts (P_ 208) can also serve
mechanics.excerpt: The Sample Contacts (P_ 208) can also serve as sample enemies since people likely to be valuable friends are also the kind of people that make dangerous adversaries; Enemies can provide useful inspiration for the gamemas ter'$ campaign and can serve as excellent motivators for the characters_ Enemies should get involved adventures often enough to be nuisance.
